items.caption: A slide from a presentation, focusing on the concept of "entrance ramps" in the context of road design. the slide is titled "entrance ramps" and is part of "topic 2 lesson 1." it features a diagram illustrating the three sections of an entrance ramp: the entrance or access ramp, the acceleration lane, and the merging area. the diagram is accompanied by text that explains the purpose of each section and how they contribute to the smooth flow of traffic entering an expressway. the text also mentions that the entrance ramp provides one-way directional access to the expressway. the slide is designed to be educational, with a clear and straightforward layout that combines visual aids with textual information.
